Free Resource Policy.__EMPTY: This workbook covers 225 IT and tech job roles — 100 original roles (A–I) plus 125 new roles (I–Z) — mapping the technical skills and AI tools required for each role in 2025 and beyond.

Every learning resource, certification study path, and AI tool listed is FREE or student-accessible. Where industry-standard paid certifications exist (e.g. AWS SAA, CKA, OSCP, CompTIA), the study resources and preparation materials listed are free. The exam itself may carry a fee.

• freeCodeCamp (freeCodeCamp.org) — full stack, Python, data science
• Kaggle Learn (kaggle.com/learn) — ML, data science, SQL
• HuggingFace Course (huggingface.co/learn) — NLP, LLMs, transformers
• The Odin Project (theodinproject.com) — full stack web development
• MIT OpenCourseWare (ocw.mit.edu) — CS, maths, engineering
• AWS Skill Builder free tier (skillbuilder.aws) — AWS services
• Microsoft Learn (learn.microsoft.com) — Azure, M365, Power Platform
• Google Cloud Skills Boost free tier — GCP
• Salesforce Trailhead (trailhead.salesforce.com) — Salesforce ecosystem
• ServiceNow Now Learning (nowlearning.servicenow.com) — ServiceNow
• openSAP.com — SAP products (fully free)
• Databricks Community Edition — Apache Spark
• TryHackMe free tier / Hack The Box free tier — cybersecurity
• PortSwigger Web Security Academy (portswigger.net/web-security) — web appsec
• MITRE ATT&CK (attack.mitre.org) — threat intelligence
• Kubernetes official docs + CKA prep — cloud-native
• HDLBits (hdlbits.01xz.net) — digital design / FPGA
• OpenROAD (openroad.readthedocs.io) — VLSI / physical design
• Qiskit / IBM Quantum Learning — quantum computing
• GitHub Education Pack (github.com/education) — GitHub Copilot + tools (free for students)
